arts.ttl: Guehi bid rejected as Chelsea and Spurs plot NEW offer
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have rejected a major bid for centre-back Marc Guehi but face a renewed assault on the player from Chelsea, Tottenham and Newcastle. Palace will not, however, allow Guehi to depart in the middle of the season, with The Athletic reporting that a “major” bid from Tottenham has been turned down.
